---
title: "Data sources and Citations"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette
bibliography: references.bib
csl: nature.csl
link-citations: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Data sources and Citations}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
library(site)
```

# `r un_badge()`

## UNWPP@UNWPP
- **Dataset name:** WPP2022_Population1JanuaryBySingleAgeSex_Medium_1950-2021
- **Accessed via:** Webpage
- **Last updated:**

- **Dataset name:** WPP2022_Population1JanuaryBySingleAgeSex_Medium_2022-2100
- **Accessed via:** Webpage
- **Last updated:**

## UNWUP@UNWUP
- **Dataset name:**
- **Accessed via:**
- **Last updated:**

---

# `r worldpop_badge()`

## Population spatial distribution @WorldPop2025
- **Raster alias:** G2_CN_POP_R25A_1km 
- **Raster name:** Individual countries 2015-2030 ( 1km resolution ) R2025A v1
- **Accessed via:** API
- vLast updated:** 06/01/2026

# Malaria Atlas Project (MAP)
- **Raster name:**
- **Last updated**

# Citations
